# Site Architecture
- /: Home page - Welcome to the Smart Attendance System
- /dashboard: User dashboard - Access attendance records and manage users
- /login: User login - Dashboard Login
- /register: User registration
- /mark_your_attendance: Mark Time-In - Clock in for the day
- /mark_your_attendance_out: Mark Time-Out - Clock out when you're done
- /view_my_attendance: View personal attendance records
